calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cowan, via zoom, for Barbara Brooks, in court, Personal Representative; Gregory Banks, in court, Objector.

The court provides a summary of the previous hearing in this matter and advises that the court has read Mr. Banks' objection. Mr. Banks offers oral testimony regarding his position in this matter specifically, with respect to the most recent appraisal of the real property which he feels is outdated and underestimated. Mr. Cowan offers oral testimony regarding the status of the appraisal and points to Mr. Banks having agreed to this petition more than once. Ms. Brooks offers testimony regarding the history of this matter and confirms that Mr. Brooks had previously agree to the petition but then changed his mind.

The court advises that it intends to grant the petition and the matter is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Teebay. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Continued To Mar-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cowan, via ZOOM, for Barbara Brooks, via ZOOM, Personal Representative; Gregory Banks, in court, in propria persona, Interested Party.

Mr. Cowan reports that the handling this matter has been a bit more complicated than expected and the offers reasons why and offers testimony as to what has caused the complications. The court points to the request for fees and Mr. Cowan offers testimony advocating his request. The court advises the parties that it will be taking the matter under submission.

***After hearing: Gregory Banks advises the court that he objects to the petition and offers testimony in support of his position. The court queries Mr. Banks as to why he did not state his objection in open court prior to the matter being taken under submission. Mr. Banks reports that he had checked in and was seated in court but did not understand the court's procedures. Barbara Brooks remained on ZOOM and provided a brief update regarding the differing family dynamics. The court unsuccessfully attempts to contact Mr. Cowan via telephone to advise him regarding Mr. Banks' position. The court explains the court's procedure for the formal filing objections to Mr. Banks and advises both he and Ms. Banks that the court is continuing the matter to Mar-21-2022 and instructs Mr. Banks to file a formal objection by Mar-14-2022. Any opposition to Mr. Banks' objection should be filed by Mar-14-2022.

The hearing on Status is off calendar. The Accounting Petition is continued to Mar-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cowan for Barbara Brooks.

Mr. Cowan stated that a lot has happened, that he needs to amend the status report, and that he will then provide an order and a proof of service. The Petition to Approve Second Report on Status of Administration is continued to March 25, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Mr. Cowan that the petition needs to be properly filed, that proper notice needs to be given, and that courtesy copies and a proposed order need to be provided to the Court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Account
Off Calendar Oct-21-2019 Continued To Nov-18-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cowan for Barbara Brooks.

Mr. Cowan stated that they are trying to find a loan so that those family members that want the property can buy it, that they are having difficulty finding a lender, that everyone is in agreement and that he will file a status report. Status on close of estate is continued to November 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Mr. Cowan that either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Continued To Jun-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cowan for Barbara Brooks.

The Court noted that the notice/proof of service that was filed relates to the original petition, that it does not say it is for filing of the amended petition, that it does not have a proper proof of service for what is before it and that verification does not specifically refer to the pleading it is verifying. Mr. Cowan stated that he reached out to his Client, that she has not responded yet, that he expects to hear from his Client in the next couple of days and that he will file the verification. The Amended Report on Status of Administration is continued to June 5, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Continued To May-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cowan for Petitioner.

The Court noted that it has an amended report of status that has not been verified and no proof of notice. Mr. Cowan stated that they have been filed. The Clerk noted that the documents (petition/notice of hearing) are pending in the Court's e-filing queue. Mr. Cowan stated that Ms. Brooks has been working very hard to get the estate closed, that there are thirteen people involved, that five of them wanted to purchase the house, that there have been some issues, that the parties have become non-responsive, and that Ms. Brooks will file a petition for distribution and the parties can object if they want to. Status on close of estate is continued to May 8, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to make sure the documents get filed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
